steps.title: Convert kilometers to meters
steps.content: Since $1$ kilometer equals $1{,}000$ meters, $72$ kilometers equals $72{,}000$ meters.

steps.title: Convert hours to seconds
steps.content: One hour is $60\times60=3{,}600$ seconds, so $72$ kilometers per hour is the same as $72{,}000$ meters per $3{,}600$ seconds.

steps.title: Find meters per second
steps.content: $$\frac{72{,}000}{3{,}600}=20$$ The equivalent speed is 20 meters per second. Therefore, A is correct.
